about_mission.title: We Work For You, Not The Seller
about_mission.body: Unlike estate agents who are paid by sellers, we are instructed and paid by buyers. Our only loyalty is to you.

contact_cta.body: Speak to a buyer's agent today. We respond within one working day.

home_why_us.title: The Market Works Against Buyers — We Level It
home_why_us.body: Estate agents are legally required to act in the seller's interest. We flip that dynamic entirely.
